recent_calls.summary: The user called Budget's after-hours assistant and was asked for their ZIP code, which they provided as 63376. The agent explained the services offered and the standard service fee, and offered to have the team follow up with more details if the user provided more information about their needs. The call ended before the user gave further details.

The user called to report that their air conditioner fan was not turning and requested a service appointment for the next morning. The agent collected the user's contact information, service address, and email, and confirmed the appointment request. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests, and the call ended amicably.

The user, Wendy Tyson, requested a plumbing appointment for a toilet issue at 4057 Miami Street, Saint Louis, Missouri. The agent collected all necessary details and informed Wendy that the team would confirm the appointment on the next business day. The call concluded with a clear summary and no issues.

The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly without any meaningful interaction or resolution. The agent attempted to engage the user multiple times but received no clear response before the user hung up.

Dorothy called to schedule a leak check after a recent maintenance visit where Freon was added, expressing concern about a potential leak. The agent confirmed her contact details, including her email, and noted her preferred appointment time for Monday afternoon. Since it was after hours, the agent informed Dorothy that a representative would call her back during office hours to confirm the appointment.

Nick Watson called to schedule a final inspection for his heating and cooling system with the city of Lowell. The agent confirmed the details and noted that the team will follow up on the next business day. The user declined to provide feedback at the end of the call.

Carolyn called to dispute a service charge, explaining that the technician did not perform adequate work during the appointment. The agent documented her concerns and assured her that a representative would review the issue and call her back on the next business day. Carolyn did not request any further assistance.

Sonja called after hours requesting approval for a new unit at her address and asked to speak to Jeff. The agent documented her request and scheduled a callback for the next business day. The call ended with no further requests from Sonja.

Elisa from American Home Shield called to inquire about the status of work completed for dispatch number 34313499 at 14717 Kendall Summit Court, as the member is interested in a cash out or cash in lieu option. The after-hours assistant, Evie, documented the request and informed Elisa that a representative will follow up on the next business day. Elisa requested a callback and no further assistance was needed during the call.

The user, Corsica, called after hours to follow up on the cost of a new ventilation installation after speaking with Jeff. The agent confirmed the user's details and arranged for a callback as soon as possible. The user declined to provide an email and was not interested in giving feedback.

The user called to cancel a plumbing appointment as they fixed the problem themselves. The agent confirmed the cancellation details and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would reach out to confirm. The user declined to provide feedback and ended the call politely.

The user, Nika Beauchamp, called to inquire about the timing of a technician appointment scheduled for the next day. The agent confirmed the appointment details, informing Nika that technician Vernon would arrive between 3 and 4 PM. The user had no further questions or requests.
The user called and requested to speak with Nicole. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate agent.
The user briefly attempted to speak with the agent but did not clearly communicate their request before ending the call.

The user called with a concern about a seismic strap screwed directly into their hot water tank and wanted to know if the tank was ruined. The agent collected detailed information and arranged for a licensed technician to follow up, preferably the same day. The user declined information about maintenance programs and requested to speak with a live person, leading to a successful call transfer.
The user requested to speak with customer service, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user called and requested to speak with Nicole. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.
The user requested to speak with Amy, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate live agent successfully. The call ended shortly after the transfer was completed.

Joe Galvin called to confirm the scheduled date for a new furnace installation, which he believes is set for Tuesday through American Home Shield. The agent clarified details and assured Joe that the team would confirm the appointment with him. The call ended with the user's concerns addressed and no further requests.
The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

Ramona from American Home Shield called Budget to provide feedback on a dispatch. The agent, Sophie, responded and asked for more details about the feedback or any specific issues. The call ended shortly after without further information.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent to assist further. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.

Angela called to follow up on a previous call that was not returned. The agent assured her that the team would be notified to contact her directly. The call ended with the agent confirming the request and Angela expressing thanks.

The user called to confirm a replacement air conditioner service and mentioned prior communication with American Home Shield. The agent attempted to assist but the user requested to speak with a live customer service representative, leading to a successful call transfer.

Luca from American Home Shield called Budget to discuss a work order for air conditioning that was not cooling and needed urgent attention. The agent confirmed details including the correct member name, address, and contact information, and then transferred the call to the authorization department as requested. The user declined information about maintenance programs.

The user called to inquire about the timing of an inspector's visit to their house. The agent confirmed the appointment with technician Devon scheduled between 12:45 and 1:45 PM and the user expressed a wish to have known the timing earlier. The call ended with the user's inquiry resolved.
The user called and requested to speak with a live person instead of providing their ZIP code. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent as requested.

The user, Dennis from Mister Cool, called to get in touch with Daniel LaGrace at Budget Heating and Cooling but was informed that Budget does not offer service in his ZIP code area. The user clarified he was not seeking service but trying to reach Daniel. The call ended without further assistance.
No conversation happened.
The user called and mentioned receiving a police mail but wanted to speak directly to an operator. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

The user, Candice Brooks, called to inquire about the ETA of a technician scheduled to visit her house. The agent confirmed the appointment details, informing her that the technician Daveiontay is scheduled to arrive between six and seven PM. The user did not request any further assistance or changes.
The user called and requested to be transferred to a live representative. The agent confirmed and successfully transferred the call to another agent.

The user, Andrea Swearingen, called to inquire about the arrival time of a technician for a repair. The agent was unable to find the appointment in the system and offered to transfer the user to a live representative, which the user accepted. The call was then successfully transferred to a live agent.

Sophia Hunter called to inquire about the status of her air conditioning replacement and whether American Home Shield would cover it. The agent confirmed her details and arranged for a callback as soon as possible. Sophia declined information about maintenance programs and requested a prompt return call.

Jim called after receiving an unexpected call from Budget regarding a scheduled appointment for heating and cooling service under an American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed appointment details, noted the service as an emergency, and recorded Jim's preference for a morning appointment. Jim provided positive feedback about the call's efficiency before ending the conversation.

The user, Omar Mahasneh, called to schedule a consultation for optimizing his gas water heater system and requested a master plumber. The agent provided available time slots, but the user specified a preference for a time after 5 PM, which was not available in the offered slots. The call ended with the user hanging up without confirming a booking.

The user called back after missing a previous call from Budget. The agent acknowledged this and proceeded to transfer the user to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to speak to a specific person named Mister Hello but the conversation was very brief and ended abruptly. The agent identified herself and asked how she could help, but the user did not engage further before hanging up.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent. The call was successfully transferred without further interaction.

The user called to speak with Nicole about making an appointment related to home warranty work for heating and cooling issues. The agent confirmed the nature of the request and transferred the call to a live representative for further assistance.

Angela Sevier called to schedule an appointment for air conditioner replacement or repair, providing her home warranty dispatch number and confirming her availability. The agent collected all necessary details and informed her that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her soon. Angela declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another agent.

The user, Knedi from American Home Shield, called to provide a dispatch number and request a technician visit for heating and AC issues. The agent confirmed the dispatch details and attempted to gather scheduling information for the technician visit. The call ended before the scheduling details were finalized.

The user called Budget but was actually trying to reach a different company, Lead Science, to schedule a meeting with one of the owners. The agent clarified the company and offered assistance, but the user declined further help and ended the call shortly after.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent. The call was successfully transferred without further interaction.

Kevin called to reschedule his routine AC maintenance appointment. He was unsure about the preferred timing, so the agent noted his flexibility and informed him that a team member would follow up to finalize the appointment. The agent provided available time slots and confirmed the details with Kevin.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent transferred the call to a live agent successfully. The call lasted 24 seconds and ended with a call transfer.
